TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: masbarux_借工還工
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 農耕文化 == mastikuk lu rali' ong musa cu nak tutux muti' mumarah ong, ungat ka atu' inoxan mu kay. lulunglung cu ong, pungan mu ka ke' ni ci'uli ga, moka masbarux ni ga habarow ci'uli ma ca, musa cu la kay, musa cu mululi' cu ka ci'uli, musa masbarux la ca, maspat hari' ka sinbahan mu la ga maras cu la. ramas cubay ka masbarux la ga, ini' pasasangel, mamicuw hari' ka biningun uri', lu wasti' ka inoxan, yonani' la ong, ini' paguruw cubay ka ke naha ong, ramas ka masbarux mu kung, cikaca' la ga musa cu sabarux lu, maspat ci'uli ka lon mu la, kora nak kung malikur mu la ga malaprow min la. 10個人. at kantang ka masbarux ni uri' ga, habarow ong, as ka pahpuy ci mami', utux ba' ci pahpuy mami' ka malikur mu wa , ana i utux tepeh yaba' ga bali'un ni palahlah ca, yonani' la ong pa'aring hari' malaprow wagi' musa kalalama' wa ka pahpuy mami' ni, malaprow utux wagi' la ga puson naha' ka mami' la, moka' mami' la ong malaprow sa'ing wagi' la ga mahu'il nak uri' la, tumahuk tikiy cu raramat ong, moka ken nak na pila hiya ga miniy ci seng, runngu' cu ma payux ni'un ka babang ong. . luhgun naha' la ka seng ca, utux luhuw ga tugal ruma', payux nak hari' inaras naha ga parat ca, anak nak tumahuk ci gilung uri, sun naha kani' lumuhuw, kani' ka mintana' mani' kora' la. mani' mami' la ong rumamat ci ka asinuw hani' la, ga mintana' mani' kora' la, ungat ka payux ka nani'un. ruma' ga haprow mani' ruma' , mani' ci mami' la, kani' ga kine' mami' la ong mahnguw tikiy hang, moka malikur hiya la ong lunhaw ci kewah, kewah ca silahaw nak ki pihuri' ma ca, cubay nak ka sun kunaga'uw ni, katuhur ka kahuni ka kutan ca. moka kankanel hiya ga waxiy, waxiy ka kutan naha' lu kaman ca' araw uri', moka lina na malikur ga, han ta'arus ka araw ca. yonani' i musa i mumarah ong, malaprow wagi' ga abas tikiy mahnguw hang wa, ma ka lawpan ca tanmumarah, pahnguw ta tikiy hang wa ma! ! mahnguw tikiy mani' nak tamaku' ka mani' tamaku' ca, moka kankanel hiya ga matama' nak, musa' mabuli' ci use' ruma' abun ca, tuhya ka use' ka use' na mumarah hiya, malaprow utux wagi' la ga, wal kalalama pahpuy mami' kutux ka malikur la , ima' ka tun naha', moka ka malikur mu rali' ka intaxan mu nak hiya. musa' pahpuy ka mali'kur ong bale' palalah, ini ini' tana ka siumuk ka mira' ong amukan na abaw ga'iloh, minlu' i ini' tana' amukan ka mami' ca, ini' katelu' la mami', as ka mintana pahulhul kora' ca, kani' ka as ka tabali'un umumuk, ma hari' pakani' mami' la ga, tahkun naha' ka seng wa, at uri' ga gilung ca, habarow hari' ka ci'uli ga, ye angungu' cu at patana' hari' at patikrak la ong, at patikrak la ca ta'an naha' ka totah luhgun naha' ka asinuw, ana su pan tugal luhgun uri', ini' cubay papapa'ul la ken kora' la ca. seng wa si'ingkux rali' lu, moka ucyux mangihur ini' naha' apuli' ka ucyux mangihur hiya, maruk kine' cubay ni'un ka ucyux mangihur ca. turakis hari' ni'un ta rali' hang, pahruming ca lu siramat ka ucuyx i ucyux mangihur haca, yonani' mine' la ga mine' cankan rex la ga mahnguw tikiy hang, musa' minarang luri' nanu' hari' i wo puhurow ka wagi' la ong, patehuk hari' ragex ka wagi' la ga. malawa' ka tanmumarah la wa, tana' la wa ma maha' ta morow la ma, karima' malahngan la ga at ta paktox tu'uy la ma, yonani' ca ka utux rex inoxan hani'. haprow nak cubay minarang ruma' ka malikur wa , kanel hiya nanak musa' i ta'arus ci araw, maka linar na malikur ga han kumut ka, ca moka kahuni', yonani' la ong wasti' ka inohan ay! habarow hari' ci'uli rasun ga wasti' ka inohan, lu gaben la ong maruk wagi' la ong, malawa' la wa' ka tanmumarah luri', tana la wa ma mata morong la ma, yonani' masu' ka sun utux rex hani' la. minlu' tuhya' ka kelan ka makutux rex mabel mak sa'ing rex maki' ki uri', ah ka makmabel nak mumarah kaca wa, mabuna' nak maskakiy la i tuhya' la, yona' musa' Yesun la ga yona ramagal wagi' nak matatuli' masinhayuw, tehuk ci ka Marosan haca la ga mapitu' nak hari' wagi' la makakiy. ungat otobay rali' hang, kunaga'uw rali' hang cong, wo payux rex musa malawa ci moh sunbarux ong, malaprow malalaprow hari' ca, payux nak carung uri' la ga ma'inayaw la, malaprow hari' kumulut ta ci kumulut ci kahuni' lunar ci kahuni', pata'arus ruma' ca malikur pata'arus, moka kanel hiya ga sunsul hari' kumut ci waxiy raxal, kumut ci kahuni' hang masu' kumut kahuni' la ga payux kahuni' la ca, hipan hang hipan tutux hang, mastahar ka araw ni lu mastahar tikiy ka ini paculing la ong, han kunaga'uw la han naha lunbak la lunbak. silin naha ka kahuni' lu payux sinli' la ong, calingun naha hari' la mangu' la, han cumuling inutu' sun naha kaca, inutu'. kunaga'uw ga maras hari' payux ci'uli sunbarux ca ong, amol ka babingun na ka kunaga'uw hiya ca, minarang hang pakalu' ci waxiy ga kutan ka waxiy, pakalu' ci ka katuhur na kahuni' kulutan larun ca larun, kani' ga kora' ka sun ramiruw ga kutan kaca uri', Ba'un cu mangu' hari kora' ka abaw ni la ong, kaca' ka hipan naha la. hipan micuw ga as ka ungat kora' aw ka kahuna, ini' wa ini' ruma', maki' ci ka purihing ong purihing ca, maki' ci purihing la mahuri' kaca la, ini' as kaculing kaca, kaca' ka halan naha lunbak babuw ni la. ramas ar ka hinipan ka sun inutu' hani, han mamuhi' ci ciyak ga yaba' la ciyak ni kay, ya ka ramas ka abulit ni ken na 肥料ca. kewas ca kakulut kunaga'uw ga kewah kakulut, moka rik ga abas naha tikiy kalabahun ka mira' ar, ruma' kaman ca waxiy waxiy uri galun naha' kutan naha, payux ong babingun ka sun kunaga'uw hani, kani' ka malahang ci ci'uli moh sunbarux, kunaga'uw hang ga hipan la ga kaca' ka lunbak la, masu lunbak la ong ken na ramiruw ga tabulun naha' ka ramiruw kalabahun naha' ruma' ka mira', moka ramas carung hiya ga wo maculing hari' kora' ka pinanangan ga, ramas carung kaca wa as hali' mamuhi' ci atiy la ka ramas miculing. .
S.PHON: == **** == mas~ɕtikuk lu raliʔ oŋ mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu nak tutux mutiʔ mumaraħ oŋ, uŋat ka atuʔ inoxan mu kaj. luluŋluŋ ʦ~ʨu oŋ, puŋan mu ka keʔ ni ʦ~ʨiʔuli ɣa, moka mas~ɕβarux ni ɣa ħaβarow ʦ~ʨiʔuli ma ʦ~ʨa, mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu la kaj, mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu mululiʔ ʦ~ʨu ka ʦ~ʨiʔuli, mus~ɕa mas~ɕβarux la ʦ~ʨa, mas~ɕpat ħariʔ ka s~ɕinβaħan mu la ɣa maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨu la. ramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨuβaj ka mas~ɕβarux la ɣa, iniʔ pas~ɕas~ɕaŋel, mamiʦ~ʨuw ħariʔ ka βiniŋun uriʔ, lu was~ɕtiʔ ka inoxan, jonaniʔ la oŋ, iniʔ paɣuruw ʦ~ʨuβaj ka ke naħa oŋ, ramas~ɕ ka mas~ɕβarux mu kuŋ, ʦ~ʨikaʦ~ʨaʔ la ɣa mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu s~ɕaβarux lu, mas~ɕpat ʦ~ʨiʔuli ka lon mu la, kora nak kuŋ malikur mu la ɣa malaprow min la. ****. at kantaŋ ka mas~ɕβarux ni uriʔ ɣa, ħaβarow oŋ, as~ɕ ka paħpuj ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ, utux βaʔ ʦ~ʨi paħpuj mamiʔ ka malikur mu wa , ana i utux tepeħ jaβaʔ ɣa βaliʔun ni palaħlaħ ʦ~ʨa, jonaniʔ la oŋ paʔariŋ ħariʔ malaprow waɣiʔ mus~ɕa kalalamaʔ wa ka paħpuj mamiʔ ni, malaprow utux waɣiʔ la ɣa pus~ɕon naħaʔ ka mamiʔ la, mokaʔ mamiʔ la oŋ malaprow s~ɕaʔiŋ waɣiʔ la ɣa maħuʔil nak uriʔ la, tumaħuk tikij ʦ~ʨu raramat oŋ, moka ken nak na pila ħija ɣa minij ʦ~ʨi s~ɕeŋ, runŋuʔ ʦ~ʨu ma pajux niʔun ka βaβaŋ oŋ. . luħɣun naħaʔ la ka s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨa, utux luħuw ɣa tuɣal rumaʔ, pajux nak ħariʔ inaras~ɕ naħa ɣa parat ʦ~ʨa, anak nak tumaħuk ʦ~ʨi ɣiluŋ uri, s~ɕun naħa kaniʔ lumuħuw, kaniʔ ka mintanaʔ maniʔ koraʔ la. maniʔ mamiʔ la oŋ rumamat ʦ~ʨi ka as~ɕinuw ħaniʔ la, ɣa mintanaʔ maniʔ koraʔ la, uŋat ka pajux ka naniʔun. rumaʔ ɣa ħaprow maniʔ rumaʔ , maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ la, kaniʔ ɣa kineʔ mamiʔ la oŋ maħŋuw tikij ħaŋ, moka malikur ħija la oŋ lunħaw ʦ~ʨi kewaħ, kewaħ ʦ~ʨa s~ɕilaħaw nak ki piħuriʔ ma ʦ~ʨa, ʦ~ʨuβaj nak ka s~ɕun kunaɣaʔuw ni, katuħur ka kaħuni ka kutan ʦ~ʨa. moka kankanel ħija ɣa waxij, waxij ka kutan naħaʔ lu kaman ʦ~ʨaʔ araw uriʔ, moka lina na malikur ɣa, ħan taʔarus~ɕ ka araw ʦ~ʨa. jonaniʔ i mus~ɕa i mumaraħ oŋ, malaprow waɣiʔ ɣa aβas~ɕ tikij maħŋuw ħaŋ wa, ma ka lawpan ʦ~ʨa tanmumaraħ, paħŋuw ta tikij ħaŋ wa ma! ! maħŋuw tikij maniʔ nak tamakuʔ ka maniʔ tamakuʔ ʦ~ʨa, moka kankanel ħija ɣa matamaʔ nak, mus~ɕaʔ maβuliʔ ʦ~ʨi us~ɕeʔ rumaʔ aβun ʦ~ʨa, tuħja ka us~ɕeʔ ka us~ɕeʔ na mumaraħ ħija, malaprow utux waɣiʔ la ɣa, wal kalalama paħpuj mamiʔ kutux ka malikur la , imaʔ ka tun naħaʔ, moka ka malikur mu raliʔ ka intaxan mu nak ħija. mus~ɕaʔ paħpuj ka maliʔkur oŋ βaleʔ palalaħ, ini iniʔ tana ka s~ɕiumuk ka miraʔ oŋ amukan na aβaw ɣaʔiloħ, minluʔ i iniʔ tanaʔ amukan ka mamiʔ ʦ~ʨa, iniʔ kateluʔ la mamiʔ, as~ɕ ka mintana paħulħul koraʔ ʦ~ʨa, kaniʔ ka as~ɕ ka taβaliʔun umumuk, ma ħariʔ pakaniʔ mamiʔ la ɣa, taħkun naħaʔ ka s~ɕeŋ wa, at uriʔ ɣa ɣiluŋ ʦ~ʨa, ħaβarow ħariʔ ka ʦ~ʨiʔuli ɣa, je aŋuŋuʔ ʦ~ʨu at patanaʔ ħariʔ at patikrak la oŋ, at patikrak la ʦ~ʨa taʔan naħaʔ ka totaħ luħɣun naħaʔ ka as~ɕinuw, ana s~ɕu pan tuɣal luħɣun uriʔ, iniʔ ʦ~ʨuβaj papapaʔul la ken koraʔ la ʦ~ʨa. s~ɕeŋ wa s~ɕiʔiŋkux raliʔ lu, moka uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur iniʔ naħaʔ apuliʔ ka uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur ħija, maruk kineʔ ʦ~ʨuβaj niʔun ka uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur ʦ~ʨa. turakis~ɕ ħariʔ niʔun ta raliʔ ħaŋ, paħrumiŋ ʦ~ʨa lu s~ɕiramat ka uʦ~ʨujx i uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur ħaʦ~ʨa, jonaniʔ mineʔ la ɣa mineʔ ʦ~ʨankan rex la ɣa maħŋuw tikij ħaŋ, mus~ɕaʔ minaraŋ luriʔ nanuʔ ħariʔ i wo puħurow ka waɣiʔ la oŋ, pateħuk ħariʔ raɣex ka waɣiʔ la ɣa. malawaʔ ka tanmumaraħ la wa, tanaʔ la wa ma maħaʔ ta morow la ma, karimaʔ malaħŋan la ɣa at ta paktox tuʔuj la ma, jonaniʔ ʦ~ʨa ka utux rex inoxan ħaniʔ. ħaprow nak ʦ~ʨuβaj minaraŋ rumaʔ ka malikur wa , kanel ħija nanak mus~ɕaʔ i taʔarus~ɕ ʦ~ʨi araw, maka linar na malikur ɣa ħan kumut ka, ʦ~ʨa moka kaħuniʔ, jonaniʔ la oŋ was~ɕtiʔ ka inoħan aj! ħaβarow ħariʔ ʦ~ʨiʔuli ras~ɕun ɣa was~ɕtiʔ ka inoħan, lu ɣaβen la oŋ maruk waɣiʔ la oŋ, malawaʔ la waʔ ka tanmumaraħ luriʔ, tana la wa ma mata moroŋ la ma, jonaniʔ mas~ɕuʔ ka s~ɕun utux rex ħaniʔ la. minluʔ tuħjaʔ ka kelan ka makutux rex maβel mak s~ɕaʔiŋ rex makiʔ ki uriʔ, aħ ka makmaβel nak mumaraħ kaʦ~ʨa wa, maβunaʔ nak mas~ɕkakij la i tuħjaʔ la, jonaʔ mus~ɕaʔ jes~ɕun la ɣa jona ramaɣal waɣiʔ nak matatuliʔ mas~ɕinħajuw, teħuk ʦ~ʨi ka maros~ɕan ħaʦ~ʨa la ɣa mapituʔ nak ħariʔ waɣiʔ la makakij. uŋat otoβaj raliʔ ħaŋ, kunaɣaʔuw raliʔ ħaŋ ʦ~ʨoŋ, wo pajux rex mus~ɕa malawa ʦ~ʨi moħ s~ɕunβarux oŋ, malaprow malalaprow ħariʔ ʦ~ʨa, pajux nak ʦ~ʨaruŋ uriʔ la ɣa maʔinajaw la, malaprow ħariʔ kumulut ta ʦ~ʨi kumulut ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ lunar ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ, pataʔarus~ɕ rumaʔ ʦ~ʨa malikur pataʔarus~ɕ, moka kanel ħija ɣa s~ɕuns~ɕul ħariʔ kumut ʦ~ʨi waxij raxal, kumut ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ ħaŋ mas~ɕuʔ kumut kaħuniʔ la ɣa pajux kaħuniʔ la ʦ~ʨa, ħipan ħaŋ ħipan tutux ħaŋ, mas~ɕtaħar ka araw ni lu mas~ɕtaħar tikij ka ini paʦ~ʨuliŋ la oŋ, ħan kunaɣaʔuw la ħan naħa lunβak la lunβak. s~ɕilin naħa ka kaħuniʔ lu pajux s~ɕinliʔ la oŋ, ʦ~ʨaliŋun naħa ħariʔ la maŋuʔ la, ħan ʦ~ʨumuliŋ inutuʔ s~ɕun naħa kaʦ~ʨa, inutuʔ. kunaɣaʔuw ɣa maras~ɕ ħariʔ pajux ʦ~ʨiʔuli s~ɕunβarux ʦ~ʨa oŋ, amol ka βaβiŋun na ka kunaɣaʔuw ħija ʦ~ʨa, minaraŋ ħaŋ pakaluʔ ʦ~ʨi waxij ɣa kutan ka waxij, pakaluʔ ʦ~ʨi ka katuħur na kaħuniʔ kulutan larun ʦ~ʨa larun, kaniʔ ɣa koraʔ ka s~ɕun ramiruw ɣa kutan kaʦ~ʨa uriʔ, βaʔun ʦ~ʨu maŋuʔ ħari koraʔ ka aβaw ni la oŋ, kaʦ~ʨaʔ ka ħipan naħa la. ħipan miʦ~ʨuw ɣa as~ɕ ka uŋat koraʔ aw ka kaħuna, iniʔ wa iniʔ rumaʔ, makiʔ ʦ~ʨi ka puriħiŋ oŋ puriħiŋ ʦ~ʨa, makiʔ ʦ~ʨi puriħiŋ la maħuriʔ kaʦ~ʨa la, iniʔ as~ɕ kaʦ~ʨuliŋ kaʦ~ʨa, kaʦ~ʨaʔ ka ħalan naħa lunβak βaβuw ni la. ramas~ɕ ar ka ħinipan ka s~ɕun inutuʔ ħani, ħan mamuħiʔ ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨijak ɣa jaβaʔ la ʦ~ʨijak ni kaj, ja ka ramas~ɕ ka aβulit ni ken na **ʦ~ʨa. kewas~ɕ ʦ~ʨa kakulut kunaɣaʔuw ɣa kewaħ kakulut, moka rik ɣa aβas~ɕ naħa tikij kalaβaħun ka miraʔ ar, rumaʔ kaman ʦ~ʨa waxij waxij uri ɣalun naħaʔ kutan naħa, pajux oŋ βaβiŋun ka s~ɕun kunaɣaʔuw ħani, kaniʔ ka malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨiʔuli moħ s~ɕunβarux, kunaɣaʔuw ħaŋ ɣa ħipan la ɣa kaʦ~ʨaʔ ka lunβak la, mas~ɕu lunβak la oŋ ken na ramiruw ɣa taβulun naħaʔ ka ramiruw kalaβaħun naħaʔ rumaʔ ka miraʔ, moka ramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨaruŋ ħija ɣa wo maʦ~ʨuliŋ ħariʔ koraʔ ka pinanaŋan ɣa, ramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨaruŋ kaʦ~ʨa wa as~ɕ ħaliʔ mamuħiʔ ʦ~ʨi atij la ka ramas~ɕ miʦ~ʨuliŋ. .
S.FORM: == 農耕文化 == mastikuk lu rali' ong musa cu nak tutux muti' mumarah ong, ungat ka atu' inoxan mu kay. lulunglung cu ong, pungan mu ka ke' ni ci'uli ga, moka masbarux ni ga habarow ci'uli ma ca, musa cu la kay, musa cu mululi' cu ka ci'uli, musa masbarux la ca, maspat hari' ka sinbahan mu la ga maras cu la. ramas cubay ka masbarux la ga, ini' pasasangel, mamicuw hari' ka biningun uri', lu wasti' ka inoxan, yonani' la ong, ini' paguruw cubay ka ke naha ong, ramas ka masbarux mu kung, cikaca' la ga musa cu sabarux lu, maspat ci'uli ka lon mu la, kora nak kung malikur mu la ga malaprow min la. 10個人. at kantang ka masbarux ni uri' ga, habarow ong, as ka pahpuy ci mami', utux ba' ci pahpuy mami' ka malikur mu wa , ana i utux tepeh yaba' ga bali'un ni palahlah ca, yonani' la ong pa'aring hari' malaprow wagi' musa kalalama' wa ka pahpuy mami' ni, malaprow utux wagi' la ga puson naha' ka mami' la, moka' mami' la ong malaprow sa'ing wagi' la ga mahu'il nak uri' la, tumahuk tikiy cu raramat ong, moka ken nak na pila hiya ga miniy ci seng, runngu' cu ma payux ni'un ka babang ong. . luhgun naha' la ka seng ca, utux luhuw ga tugal ruma', payux nak hari' inaras naha ga parat ca, anak nak tumahuk ci gilung uri, sun naha kani' lumuhuw, kani' ka mintana' mani' kora' la. mani' mami' la ong rumamat ci ka asinuw hani' la, ga mintana' mani' kora' la, ungat ka payux ka nani'un. ruma' ga haprow mani' ruma' , mani' ci mami' la, kani' ga kine' mami' la ong mahnguw tikiy hang, moka malikur hiya la ong lunhaw ci kewah, kewah ca silahaw nak ki pihuri' ma ca, cubay nak ka sun kunaga'uw ni, katuhur ka kahuni ka kutan ca. moka kankanel hiya ga waxiy, waxiy ka kutan naha' lu kaman ca' araw uri', moka lina na malikur ga, han ta'arus ka araw ca. yonani' i musa i mumarah ong, malaprow wagi' ga abas tikiy mahnguw hang wa, ma ka lawpan ca tanmumarah, pahnguw ta tikiy hang wa ma! ! mahnguw tikiy mani' nak tamaku' ka mani' tamaku' ca, moka kankanel hiya ga matama' nak, musa' mabuli' ci use' ruma' abun ca, tuhya ka use' ka use' na mumarah hiya, malaprow utux wagi' la ga, wal kalalama pahpuy mami' kutux ka malikur la , ima' ka tun naha', moka ka malikur mu rali' ka intaxan mu nak hiya. musa' pahpuy ka mali'kur ong bale' palalah, ini ini' tana ka siumuk ka mira' ong amukan na abaw ga'iloh, minlu' i ini' tana' amukan ka mami' ca, ini' katelu' la mami', as ka mintana pahulhul kora' ca, kani' ka as ka tabali'un umumuk, ma hari' pakani' mami' la ga, tahkun naha' ka seng wa, at uri' ga gilung ca, habarow hari' ka ci'uli ga, ye angungu' cu at patana' hari' at patikrak la ong, at patikrak la ca ta'an naha' ka totah luhgun naha' ka asinuw, ana su pan tugal luhgun uri', ini' cubay papapa'ul la ken kora' la ca. seng wa si'ingkux rali' lu, moka ucyux mangihur ini' naha' apuli' ka ucyux mangihur hiya, maruk kine' cubay ni'un ka ucyux mangihur ca. turakis hari' ni'un ta rali' hang, pahruming ca lu siramat ka ucuyx i ucyux mangihur haca, yonani' mine' la ga mine' cankan rex la ga mahnguw tikiy hang, musa' minarang luri' nanu' hari' i wo puhurow ka wagi' la ong, patehuk hari' ragex ka wagi' la ga. malawa' ka tanmumarah la wa, tana' la wa ma maha' ta morow la ma, karima' malahngan la ga at ta paktox tu'uy la ma, yonani' ca ka utux rex inoxan hani'. haprow nak cubay minarang ruma' ka malikur wa , kanel hiya nanak musa' i ta'arus ci araw, maka linar na malikur ga han kumut ka, ca moka kahuni', yonani' la ong wasti' ka inohan ay! habarow hari' ci'uli rasun ga wasti' ka inohan, lu gaben la ong maruk wagi' la ong, malawa' la wa' ka tanmumarah luri', tana la wa ma mata morong la ma, yonani' masu' ka sun utux rex hani' la. minlu' tuhya' ka kelan ka makutux rex mabel mak sa'ing rex maki' ki uri', ah ka makmabel nak mumarah kaca wa, mabuna' nak maskakiy la i tuhya' la, yona' musa' Yesun la ga yona ramagal wagi' nak matatuli' masinhayuw, tehuk ci ka Marosan haca la ga mapitu' nak hari' wagi' la makakiy. ungat otobay rali' hang, kunaga'uw rali' hang cong, wo payux rex musa malawa ci moh sunbarux ong, malaprow malalaprow hari' ca, payux nak carung uri' la ga ma'inayaw la, malaprow hari' kumulut ta ci kumulut ci kahuni' lunar ci kahuni', pata'arus ruma' ca malikur pata'arus, moka kanel hiya ga sunsul hari' kumut ci waxiy raxal, kumut ci kahuni' hang masu' kumut kahuni' la ga payux kahuni' la ca, hipan hang hipan tutux hang, mastahar ka araw ni lu mastahar tikiy ka ini paculing la ong, han kunaga'uw la han naha lunbak la lunbak. silin naha ka kahuni' lu payux sinli' la ong, calingun naha hari' la mangu' la, han cumuling inutu' sun naha kaca, inutu'. kunaga'uw ga maras hari' payux ci'uli sunbarux ca ong, amol ka babingun na ka kunaga'uw hiya ca, minarang hang pakalu' ci waxiy ga kutan ka waxiy, pakalu' ci ka katuhur na kahuni' kulutan larun ca larun, kani' ga kora' ka sun ramiruw ga kutan kaca uri', Ba'un cu mangu' hari kora' ka abaw ni la ong, kaca' ka hipan naha la. hipan micuw ga as ka ungat kora' aw ka kahuna, ini' wa ini' ruma', maki' ci ka purihing ong purihing ca, maki' ci purihing la mahuri' kaca la, ini' as kaculing kaca, kaca' ka halan naha lunbak babuw ni la. ramas ar ka hinipan ka sun inutu' hani, han mamuhi' ci ciyak ga yaba' la ciyak ni kay, ya ka ramas ka abulit ni ken na 肥料ca. kewas ca kakulut kunaga'uw ga kewah kakulut, moka rik ga abas naha tikiy kalabahun ka mira' ar, ruma' kaman ca waxiy waxiy uri galun naha' kutan naha, payux ong babingun ka sun kunaga'uw hani, kani' ka malahang ci ci'uli moh sunbarux, kunaga'uw hang ga hipan la ga kaca' ka lunbak la, masu lunbak la ong ken na ramiruw ga tabulun naha' ka ramiruw kalabahun naha' ruma' ka mira', moka ramas carung hiya ga wo maculing hari' kora' ka pinanangan ga, ramas carung kaca wa as hali' mamuhi' ci atiy la ka ramas miculing. .
S.PHON: == **** == mas~ɕtikuk lu raliʔ oŋ mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu nak tutux mutiʔ mumaraħ oŋ, uŋat ka atuʔ inoxan mu kaj. luluŋluŋ ʦ~ʨu oŋ, puŋan mu ka keʔ ni ʦ~ʨiʔuli ɣa, moka mas~ɕβarux ni ɣa ħaβarow ʦ~ʨiʔuli ma ʦ~ʨa, mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu la kaj, mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu mululiʔ ʦ~ʨu ka ʦ~ʨiʔuli, mus~ɕa mas~ɕβarux la ʦ~ʨa, mas~ɕpat ħariʔ ka s~ɕinβaħan mu la ɣa maras~ɕ ʦ~ʨu la. ramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨuβaj ka mas~ɕβarux la ɣa, iniʔ pas~ɕas~ɕaŋel, mamiʦ~ʨuw ħariʔ ka βiniŋun uriʔ, lu was~ɕtiʔ ka inoxan, jonaniʔ la oŋ, iniʔ paɣuruw ʦ~ʨuβaj ka ke naħa oŋ, ramas~ɕ ka mas~ɕβarux mu kuŋ, ʦ~ʨikaʦ~ʨaʔ la ɣa mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu s~ɕaβarux lu, mas~ɕpat ʦ~ʨiʔuli ka lon mu la, kora nak kuŋ malikur mu la ɣa malaprow min la. ****. at kantaŋ ka mas~ɕβarux ni uriʔ ɣa, ħaβarow oŋ, as~ɕ ka paħpuj ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ, utux βaʔ ʦ~ʨi paħpuj mamiʔ ka malikur mu wa , ana i utux tepeħ jaβaʔ ɣa βaliʔun ni palaħlaħ ʦ~ʨa, jonaniʔ la oŋ paʔariŋ ħariʔ malaprow waɣiʔ mus~ɕa kalalamaʔ wa ka paħpuj mamiʔ ni, malaprow utux waɣiʔ la ɣa pus~ɕon naħaʔ ka mamiʔ la, mokaʔ mamiʔ la oŋ malaprow s~ɕaʔiŋ waɣiʔ la ɣa maħuʔil nak uriʔ la, tumaħuk tikij ʦ~ʨu raramat oŋ, moka ken nak na pila ħija ɣa minij ʦ~ʨi s~ɕeŋ, runŋuʔ ʦ~ʨu ma pajux niʔun ka βaβaŋ oŋ. . luħɣun naħaʔ la ka s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨa, utux luħuw ɣa tuɣal rumaʔ, pajux nak ħariʔ inaras~ɕ naħa ɣa parat ʦ~ʨa, anak nak tumaħuk ʦ~ʨi ɣiluŋ uri, s~ɕun naħa kaniʔ lumuħuw, kaniʔ ka mintanaʔ maniʔ koraʔ la. maniʔ mamiʔ la oŋ rumamat ʦ~ʨi ka as~ɕinuw ħaniʔ la, ɣa mintanaʔ maniʔ koraʔ la, uŋat ka pajux ka naniʔun. rumaʔ ɣa ħaprow maniʔ rumaʔ , maniʔ ʦ~ʨi mamiʔ la, kaniʔ ɣa kineʔ mamiʔ la oŋ maħŋuw tikij ħaŋ, moka malikur ħija la oŋ lunħaw ʦ~ʨi kewaħ, kewaħ ʦ~ʨa s~ɕilaħaw nak ki piħuriʔ ma ʦ~ʨa, ʦ~ʨuβaj nak ka s~ɕun kunaɣaʔuw ni, katuħur ka kaħuni ka kutan ʦ~ʨa. moka kankanel ħija ɣa waxij, waxij ka kutan naħaʔ lu kaman ʦ~ʨaʔ araw uriʔ, moka lina na malikur ɣa, ħan taʔarus~ɕ ka araw ʦ~ʨa. jonaniʔ i mus~ɕa i mumaraħ oŋ, malaprow waɣiʔ ɣa aβas~ɕ tikij maħŋuw ħaŋ wa, ma ka lawpan ʦ~ʨa tanmumaraħ, paħŋuw ta tikij ħaŋ wa ma! ! maħŋuw tikij maniʔ nak tamakuʔ ka maniʔ tamakuʔ ʦ~ʨa, moka kankanel ħija ɣa matamaʔ nak, mus~ɕaʔ maβuliʔ ʦ~ʨi us~ɕeʔ rumaʔ aβun ʦ~ʨa, tuħja ka us~ɕeʔ ka us~ɕeʔ na mumaraħ ħija, malaprow utux waɣiʔ la ɣa, wal kalalama paħpuj mamiʔ kutux ka malikur la , imaʔ ka tun naħaʔ, moka ka malikur mu raliʔ ka intaxan mu nak ħija. mus~ɕaʔ paħpuj ka maliʔkur oŋ βaleʔ palalaħ, ini iniʔ tana ka s~ɕiumuk ka miraʔ oŋ amukan na aβaw ɣaʔiloħ, minluʔ i iniʔ tanaʔ amukan ka mamiʔ ʦ~ʨa, iniʔ kateluʔ la mamiʔ, as~ɕ ka mintana paħulħul koraʔ ʦ~ʨa, kaniʔ ka as~ɕ ka taβaliʔun umumuk, ma ħariʔ pakaniʔ mamiʔ la ɣa, taħkun naħaʔ ka s~ɕeŋ wa, at uriʔ ɣa ɣiluŋ ʦ~ʨa, ħaβarow ħariʔ ka ʦ~ʨiʔuli ɣa, je aŋuŋuʔ ʦ~ʨu at patanaʔ ħariʔ at patikrak la oŋ, at patikrak la ʦ~ʨa taʔan naħaʔ ka totaħ luħɣun naħaʔ ka as~ɕinuw, ana s~ɕu pan tuɣal luħɣun uriʔ, iniʔ ʦ~ʨuβaj papapaʔul la ken koraʔ la ʦ~ʨa. s~ɕeŋ wa s~ɕiʔiŋkux raliʔ lu, moka uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur iniʔ naħaʔ apuliʔ ka uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur ħija, maruk kineʔ ʦ~ʨuβaj niʔun ka uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur ʦ~ʨa. turakis~ɕ ħariʔ niʔun ta raliʔ ħaŋ, paħrumiŋ ʦ~ʨa lu s~ɕiramat ka uʦ~ʨujx i uʦ~ʨjux maŋiħur ħaʦ~ʨa, jonaniʔ mineʔ la ɣa mineʔ ʦ~ʨankan rex la ɣa maħŋuw tikij ħaŋ, mus~ɕaʔ minaraŋ luriʔ nanuʔ ħariʔ i wo puħurow ka waɣiʔ la oŋ, pateħuk ħariʔ raɣex ka waɣiʔ la ɣa. malawaʔ ka tanmumaraħ la wa, tanaʔ la wa ma maħaʔ ta morow la ma, karimaʔ malaħŋan la ɣa at ta paktox tuʔuj la ma, jonaniʔ ʦ~ʨa ka utux rex inoxan ħaniʔ. ħaprow nak ʦ~ʨuβaj minaraŋ rumaʔ ka malikur wa , kanel ħija nanak mus~ɕaʔ i taʔarus~ɕ ʦ~ʨi araw, maka linar na malikur ɣa ħan kumut ka, ʦ~ʨa moka kaħuniʔ, jonaniʔ la oŋ was~ɕtiʔ ka inoħan aj! ħaβarow ħariʔ ʦ~ʨiʔuli ras~ɕun ɣa was~ɕtiʔ ka inoħan, lu ɣaβen la oŋ maruk waɣiʔ la oŋ, malawaʔ la waʔ ka tanmumaraħ luriʔ, tana la wa ma mata moroŋ la ma, jonaniʔ mas~ɕuʔ ka s~ɕun utux rex ħaniʔ la. minluʔ tuħjaʔ ka kelan ka makutux rex maβel mak s~ɕaʔiŋ rex makiʔ ki uriʔ, aħ ka makmaβel nak mumaraħ kaʦ~ʨa wa, maβunaʔ nak mas~ɕkakij la i tuħjaʔ la, jonaʔ mus~ɕaʔ jes~ɕun la ɣa jona ramaɣal waɣiʔ nak matatuliʔ mas~ɕinħajuw, teħuk ʦ~ʨi ka maros~ɕan ħaʦ~ʨa la ɣa mapituʔ nak ħariʔ waɣiʔ la makakij. uŋat otoβaj raliʔ ħaŋ, kunaɣaʔuw raliʔ ħaŋ ʦ~ʨoŋ, wo pajux rex mus~ɕa malawa ʦ~ʨi moħ s~ɕunβarux oŋ, malaprow malalaprow ħariʔ ʦ~ʨa, pajux nak ʦ~ʨaruŋ uriʔ la ɣa maʔinajaw la, malaprow ħariʔ kumulut ta ʦ~ʨi kumulut ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ lunar ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ, pataʔarus~ɕ rumaʔ ʦ~ʨa malikur pataʔarus~ɕ, moka kanel ħija ɣa s~ɕuns~ɕul ħariʔ kumut ʦ~ʨi waxij raxal, kumut ʦ~ʨi kaħuniʔ ħaŋ mas~ɕuʔ kumut kaħuniʔ la ɣa pajux kaħuniʔ la ʦ~ʨa, ħipan ħaŋ ħipan tutux ħaŋ, mas~ɕtaħar ka araw ni lu mas~ɕtaħar tikij ka ini paʦ~ʨuliŋ la oŋ, ħan kunaɣaʔuw la ħan naħa lunβak la lunβak. s~ɕilin naħa ka kaħuniʔ lu pajux s~ɕinliʔ la oŋ, ʦ~ʨaliŋun naħa ħariʔ la maŋuʔ la, ħan ʦ~ʨumuliŋ inutuʔ s~ɕun naħa kaʦ~ʨa, inutuʔ. kunaɣaʔuw ɣa maras~ɕ ħariʔ pajux ʦ~ʨiʔuli s~ɕunβarux ʦ~ʨa oŋ, amol ka βaβiŋun na ka kunaɣaʔuw ħija ʦ~ʨa, minaraŋ ħaŋ pakaluʔ ʦ~ʨi waxij ɣa kutan ka waxij, pakaluʔ ʦ~ʨi ka katuħur na kaħuniʔ kulutan larun ʦ~ʨa larun, kaniʔ ɣa koraʔ ka s~ɕun ramiruw ɣa kutan kaʦ~ʨa uriʔ, βaʔun ʦ~ʨu maŋuʔ ħari koraʔ ka aβaw ni la oŋ, kaʦ~ʨaʔ ka ħipan naħa la. ħipan miʦ~ʨuw ɣa as~ɕ ka uŋat koraʔ aw ka kaħuna, iniʔ wa iniʔ rumaʔ, makiʔ ʦ~ʨi ka puriħiŋ oŋ puriħiŋ ʦ~ʨa, makiʔ ʦ~ʨi puriħiŋ la maħuriʔ kaʦ~ʨa la, iniʔ as~ɕ kaʦ~ʨuliŋ kaʦ~ʨa, kaʦ~ʨaʔ ka ħalan naħa lunβak βaβuw ni la. ramas~ɕ ar ka ħinipan ka s~ɕun inutuʔ ħani, ħan mamuħiʔ ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨijak ɣa jaβaʔ la ʦ~ʨijak ni kaj, ja ka ramas~ɕ ka aβulit ni ken na **ʦ~ʨa. kewas~ɕ ʦ~ʨa kakulut kunaɣaʔuw ɣa kewaħ kakulut, moka rik ɣa aβas~ɕ naħa tikij kalaβaħun ka miraʔ ar, rumaʔ kaman ʦ~ʨa waxij waxij uri ɣalun naħaʔ kutan naħa, pajux oŋ βaβiŋun ka s~ɕun kunaɣaʔuw ħani, kaniʔ ka malaħaŋ ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨiʔuli moħ s~ɕunβarux, kunaɣaʔuw ħaŋ ɣa ħipan la ɣa kaʦ~ʨaʔ ka lunβak la, mas~ɕu lunβak la oŋ ken na ramiruw ɣa taβulun naħaʔ ka ramiruw kalaβaħun naħaʔ rumaʔ ka miraʔ, moka ramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨaruŋ ħija ɣa wo maʦ~ʨuliŋ ħariʔ koraʔ ka pinanaŋan ɣa, ramas~ɕ ʦ~ʨaruŋ kaʦ~ʨa wa as~ɕ ħaliʔ mamuħiʔ ʦ~ʨi atij la ka ramas~ɕ miʦ~ʨuliŋ. .
